title: Has anyone identified this symbol in The End of Evangelion
display_title: Has anyone identified this symbol in The End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Has anyone identified this symbol in The End of Evangelion?             Quote Post by taelien » Fri May 30, 2014 11:27 am I was re-watching the series yet again last week when I remembered being fascinated by this symbol when the Eva series move into place. It reminds of some kind of representation of harmonics or resonation with sound. I just want to learn more about it.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Thu Jun 12, 2014 7:37 pm During the commentary someone said something about it meaning something like "infinite" so i guess it could me something like infinite number of souls.

Article: Has anyone identified this symbol in The End of Evangelion
[]: Has anyone identified this symbol in The End of Evangelion?             Quote Post by taelien » Fri May 30, 2014 11:27 am I was re-watching the series yet again last week when I remembered being fascinated by this symbol when the Eva series move into place. It reminds of some kind of representation of harmonics or resonation with sound. I just want to learn more about it.
